svg.title: Primary Coverage Map
svg.desc: Borough map showing primary coverage in Brixton, Wandsworth, Mitcham, Sutton, Morden, Cheam, New Malden, and Epsom, with all other locations marked as outside of priority area.
svg.text: Primary Coverage + Outside of Priority Area
Mitcham, Sutton, Morden, Cheam, New Malden, Epsom.
Primary Coverage is a single continuous area.
All other map locations are outside priority.
